use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in marketing and landing pages
Form submission triggers in web applications
Navigation and routing actions in single-page applications
Interactive controls in dashboards and admin interfaces
Generic interactive elements requiring multiple visual variants
ai_summary: A versatile button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant handling. Supports hover states, focus-visible outlines, and disabled states with smooth transitions. A foundational atomic component for any React/Tailwind application requiring accessible interactive elements.
